'''Thuv Shinev''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and later [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].

==Biography==
Shinev represented 175 [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] from [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] until [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. As a newly instated Senator, in 25 ABY, he argued against [[Director/Legends|Director]] [[bel-dar-Nolek]]'s proclamation that the New Republic failed to protect [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]] from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
